name: Curtis Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Monroe County Schools (TN) - Vonore area; route driver and athletic trips for former Vonore High School
recent_news: Thomas Curtis inducted into the TAPT (Tennessee Association of Pupil Transportation) Hall of Fame, recognizing decades of service to Monroe County Schools.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (since 1998) owner-operator contracting with Monroe County Schools, TN. TAPT Hall of Fame induction strongly suggests Tommy Curtis is at or near retirement age - very high succession-signal. Fleet is tiny (likely 1-3 buses), so only attractive to Summit as part of a Tennessee independent-contractor roll-up, not a standalone tuck-in.
